_comment: Example Claude Code hooks. Merge into your Claude Code settings (.claude/settings.json) or a project .claude/settings.json. Each hook POSTs the event JSON (provided by Claude Code on stdin) to Foreman's local /hooks endpoint. On Windows, prefer curl.exe. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
_comment_auth: If you set FOREMAN_AUTH_TOKEN to expose the app (e.g. via a tunnel — issue #1 P0), /hooks is gated too: add an auth header to each command, e.g. append -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN". With no token configured (loopback-only single-user), the commands below work as-is.
